skill_description: Deploy a production-ready AI-powered calf birthing detection and cattle monitoring system

evals.name: complete-deployment
evals.prompt: I have a Rollei Safetycam HD 20 at IP 192.168.178.108:80 and want to set up automated calf birthing detection with alerts. I already have Docker installed and want to deploy this to production. My camera credentials are username 'Stallwache123!' and password 'Stallwache123!'. I want Telegram alerts enabled. Walk me through the complete setup process step-by-step.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive deployment walkthrough covering: (1) Hardware verification, (2) Kamera-Konfiguration, (3) Telegram Bot setup, (4) .env configuration creation, (5) Docker deployment, (6) System validation, (7) Monitoring setup. Should include actual commands to run and expected outputs at each step.

assertions.name: covers_kamera_validation
assertions.description: Instructions include camera connectivity testing (test_camera.py or equivalent)

assertions.name: includes_telegram_setup
assertions.description: Step-by-step Telegram Bot creation and configuration (BotFather, token, chat-id)

assertions.name: provides_docker_commands
assertions.description: Includes actual Docker commands (docker-compose up -d, docker logs -f, etc.)

assertions.name: deployment_verification
assertions.description: Health check and verification steps (FPS check, database validation, etc.)

assertions.name: troubleshooting_guidance
assertions.description: Includes at least one troubleshooting tip or common issue

evals.name: camera-integration
evals.prompt: I'm having trouble getting my camera stream to work. The RTSP URL is rtsp://192.168.178.108:554/stream and I have the credentials set up, but I'm getting 'Connection timeout' errors. What are the possible causes and how do I troubleshoot this step-by-step?
evals.expected_output: Systematic troubleshooting guide including: (1) Network connectivity checks (ping, port verification), (2) RTSP-specific validation (ffprobe, VLC testing), (3) Configuration verification, (4) Firewall/security checks, (5) Specific commands for each check with expected output.

assertions.name: rtsp_specific_tools
assertions.description: Mentions RTSP testing tools (ffprobe, VLC, or equivalent)

assertions.name: actionable_commands
assertions.description: Provides actual executable commands for each troubleshooting step

evals.name: performance-optimization
evals.prompt: My Stallwache system is using 85% CPU on a standard laptop and I want to reduce the load while maintaining detection accuracy. What are the performance tuning options and how do I implement them?
evals.expected_output: Performance optimization guide covering: (1) Frame-skip configuration, (2) Model size reduction (YOLOv8n/s vs m), (3) Resolution adjustments, (4) Hardware acceleration options, (5) Monitoring results after changes. Include specific configuration values and the trade-offs of each option.

assertions.name: frame_skip_option
assertions.description: Explains FRAME_SKIP parameter and its effect on performance

assertions.name: model_sizing
assertions.description: Discusses YOLOv8 model variants and their performance characteristics

assertions.name: tradeoffs_explained
assertions.description: Explains the accuracy vs. performance trade-offs of each optimization

assertions.name: monitoring_guidance
assertions.description: Includes how to monitor improvements (FPS, CPU usage)
